message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #f5f5dc
    ActorBorderColor #87ceeb
    ActorBackgroundColor #f0f8ff
}

actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as TaskStartMsg

participant "GuideTaskStartListener" as Listener
participant "GuideTaskStartProcessor" as Processor
participant "GuideTaskStartDomainService" as DomainService
participant "GuideTaskStartStrategy" as Strategy
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as ReadApi
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as Repository
participant "GuideTaskDataRepository" as DataRepository

TaskStartMsg ->> Listener: 1 监听任务开始消息
activate Listener
Listener ->> Processor: 2 开始处理
activate Processor
Processor ->> Repository: 3 查询任务
activate Repository
Repository --> Processor
deactivate Repository
Processor ->> DomainService: 4 开始任务
activate DomainService
DomainService ->> Strategy: 5 构建任务
activate Strategy
Strategy ->> ReadApi: 6 根据部门查询导购
activate ReadApi
ReadApi --> Strategy
deactivate ReadApi
Strategy ->> Strategy: 7 根据导购进行任务分配

rectangle "Transaction" {
    Strategy ->> DataRepository: 8 保存分配给导购的任务
    activate DataRepository
    DataRepository --> Strategy
    deactivate DataRepository
    
    Strategy ->> Repository: 9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动
    activate Repository
    Repository --> Strategy
    deactivate Repository
    
    Strategy ->> DataRepository: 10 任务流转为执行中
    activate DataRepository
    DataRepository --> Strategy
    deactivate DataRepository
}

deactivate Strategy
deactivate DomainService
deactivate Processor
deactivate Listener

@enduml
```
